title: Junior Frontend Developer at Wipro Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Wipro Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Wipro Capital India are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wipro Capital India:
Wipro Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro Capital India!
